source_formulae: P0R03495: as a Measure of Model Power:

P0R03496: Integrated Information () is a direct measure of the power of a system's generative model. A high- system is one that can model the world in a way that is both highly differentiated (it can make many distinct predictions) and highly integrated (its predictions are globally consistent). The non-linear scaling of demonstrates that the inferential capacity of the SCPN architecture grows exponentially with its structural complexity, reaching its peak efficiency at the quasicritical state, which is the optimal regime for inference.
